A beautiful place to stop and recharge for your next trip! Picnic tables, washing basins, restrooms, a grill, and a gas station!

reviews.comment:
Es nuestra parada obligada cada vez que vamos a la costa, pero el finde largo de carnaval era imposible usar los baños de mujeres, había una cola de una cuadra , siendo mujer no entiendo cómo algunas que usan los baños cuando están de paso ,los ensucien tanto y tardan como 10 minutos en los baños, un poco de respeto por la gente que trabaja ahí, es horrible ver cómo las mujeres no cuidan los baños, si son así en lugares públicos no me imagino en sus casas.

(Translated by Google)
It's our must-stop every time we go to the coast, but during the long Carnival weekend it was impossible to use the women's restrooms. There was a line a block long. As a woman, I don't understand how some women who use the restrooms while passing through make such a mess and take like 10 minutes in them. A little respect for the people who work there is a must. It's awful to see how women don't take care of the restrooms. If they're like this in public places, I can't imagine what they're like at home.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5Mk42U3V3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada solicitada, a casi medio camino, baños excelente, buen espacio verde para estirar las piernas, baños siempre limpios, le falta gnc, una de las mejores estaciones de servicios de regreso.

(Translated by Google)
Requested stop, almost halfway there, excellent restrooms, good green space to stretch your legs, restrooms always clean, lacks CNG, one of the best service stations on the way back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5MklqZWxBRRAB
